goal: Expose state graph command execution status, command preview, result preview, and relation metadata as machine-readable JSON without scraping the human command report.
tests: cargo run --quiet --bin yoyo -- eval fixtures validate --suite local-smoke
hidden_failure_mode: Graph command reports include command events, statuses, command previews, result previews, and relation provenance, but CI and release scripts must parse human text to assert command execution lineage.
